mapper.sql: board.board_key, board.board_type, board.board_title, board.board_content, board.use_yn, board.main_yn, board.board_auth_type, board.security_level, board.reg_date, board.mod_date, board.reg_user_key, board.mod_user_key

LEFT JOIN common_user reg_user ON board.reg_user_key = reg_user.user_key
LEFT JOIN common_user mod_user ON board.mod_user_key = mod_user.user_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_board (board_key, board_type, board_title, board_content, use_yn, main_yn, board_auth_type, security_level, reg_date, mod_date, reg_user_key, mod_user_key) VALUES (#{boardKey}, #{boardType}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{useYn}, #{mainYn}, #{boardAuthType}, #{securityLevel}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{regUserKey}, #{regUserKey})
mapper.update: UPDATE notice_board SET board_type = #{boardType}, board_title = #{boardTitle}, board_content = #{boardContent}, use_yn = #{useYn}, main_yn = #{mainYn}, board_auth_type = #{boardAuthType}, security_level = #{securityLevel}, mod_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, mod_user_key = #{modUserKey} WHERE board_key = #{boardKey}
